content: Phase 2: Backend - env vars, auth, models, mailer, public+admin routes, seed data
Phase 2: Frontend core - tokens/fonts, layout (Header/Footer with legal note), API lib
Phase 2: Public pages - Home, About, Programs+Detail, Gallery, Get Involved, Donate, Blog+Detail, Contact
Phase 2: Admin CMS - login, dashboard, CRUD screens, inbox, donations log, subscribers
Phase 2: SEO - meta per page, OG tags, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, schema.org JSON-LD
Phase 2: All user stories covered in development
Phase 2: End to End Testing using Testing Agent + fix all issues
